meaning: the Hour (subject of اقْتَرَبَتِ - has drawn near)
a sign/miracle (object of يَرَوْا۟ - they see)
and they strongly denied (connected to وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟)
and they followed closely (connected to وَكَذَّبُوا۟)
a matter/affair (that is owned by or connected to something else)
in it (referring to الْأَنۢبَآءِ - the news)
a strong deterrent (in مَا فِيهِ - what is in it)
a wisdom (which is described as بٰلِغَةٌ/far-reaching)
so turn yourself away! (from عَنْهُمْ - from them)
away from them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in the previous ayah)
on the day (when يَدْعُ the caller calls)
in a state of being intensely humbled (describing أَبْصٰرُهُمْ - their eyes)
they exit/are exiting (referring to the disbelievers emerging from their graves)
as if they are (like جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ - scattered locusts)
scattered about (like locusts in this ayah)
those who rush forward (describing their state while heading towards the caller)
she denied/rejected (referring to قَوْمُ نُوحٍ - the people of Noah)
before them (refers to the people of Noah who are mentioned right after this word)
people, folk (subject of كَذَّبَتْ - they denied)
and so they strongly denied/rejected (subject of وَقَالُوا۟)
and then he called upon (رَبَّهُ - his Lord)
so seek help/victory! (as a response to مَغْلُوبٌ - being overpowered)
doors/gates (object of فَفَتَحْنَآ - so we opened)
being poured out forcefully (describing مَآءٍ/water, in a possessive/descriptive phrase)
and we caused (something) to burst forth intensively (affecting الْأَرْضَ/the earth)
the earth (object of فَجَّرْنَا - We caused to burst forth)
springs (as the object being burst forth)
and so they met each other (subject of الْمَآءُ)
on/upon (connecting أَمْرٍ to what came before)
a matter/affair (possessed by something after it)
it was determined (connected to أَمْرٍ - a matter/affair)
and nails, pegs (possessed plural, referring to the ship's nails)
with our eyes (watching over the ship that floats)
as a reward (for مَن كَانَ كُفِرَ - whoever was rejected)
so how (asking about عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ - My punishment and warnings)
and my warnings (connected to عَذَابِى/my punishment)
and certainly (followed by يَسَّرْنَا - We have made easy)
we made very easy (acted on القُرْءَانَ)
the Quran (object of يَسَّرْنَا - we have made easy)
The tribe of 'Ad (subject of كَذَّبَتْ - they denied)
so how (connecting to عَادٌ's denial mentioned before)
he/it was (describing how عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ - my punishment and warnings - were)
in/during (connects يَوْمِ to what came before)
of a day (possessed by نَحْسٍ - evil/disaster)
as if they (were أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ - trunks of palm trees)
a palm tree (being described as مُّنقَعِرٍ/uprooted)
being uprooted (with emphasis, describing نَخْلٍ/palm trees)
so how (asking about عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ - My punishment and warnings)
and my warnings (connected to عَذَابِى/my punishment)
the Quran (object of يَسَّرْنَا - we have made easy)
from/of (used here to mean 'any' because it follows هَلْ)
with/by the warnings (object of كَذَّبَتْ - they denied)
and so they said (responding to what came before)
Is it a mere human being? (expressing disbelief)
in that case/then (showing the result of what was just said)
and raging fires (connected to ضَلٰلٍ - astray)
was it thrown? (referring to الذِّكْرُ - the message)
but rather (correcting what was said before)
a reckless one (describing someone in the ayah who is making false claims)
they will know (about who is the liar, the insolent one)
tomorrow (object of سَيَعْلَمُونَ - they will know)
the insolent one (subject of سَيَعْلَمُونَ - they will know)
ones who send (plural, subject of إِنَّا)
so watch them! (referring to the people being tested)
and inform them! (command to tell them important news)
the water (acted on by نَبِّئْ - inform)
a drinking portion/share (of الْمَآءَ - the water)
and then they called out loudly
their companion (the one they called in فَنَادَوْا۟)
so he took upon himself (the task of killing the camel)
and then he wounded (the camel) (connected to فَتَعَاطَىٰ)
so how (asking about عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ - My punishment and warnings)
and My warnings (connected to عَذَابِى/My punishment)
a single loud shout/cry (object of أَرْسَلْنَا)
one/single (describing the shout/blast in this ayah)
and so they were (result of صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً - a single blast)
the one who builds an enclosure (like dry twigs gathered by a shepherd)
she denied intensely/repeatedly (subject is قَوْمُ which is feminine singular grammatically)
except (connecting to ءَالَ لُوطٍ - family of Lot)
thus/like that (pointing to what was mentioned before نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا)
We reward/compensate (the one who شَكَرَ/was grateful)
he was thankful (for نِّعْمَةً - a favor)
he warned them (referring to the people of Lot in this ayah)
so they argued back and forth (with each other)
they persistently tried to persuade him (about ضَيْفِهِ - his guests)
then We wiped out completely (with Divine emphasis)
so taste! (command to group) (connected to عَذَابِى - my punishment)
and my warnings (connected to عَذَابِى - my punishment)
he came upon them in morning time (subject of عَذَابٌ - punishment)
early in the morning (describing when عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ happened)
so taste! (command to many people, connected to عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ)
We made very easy (subject of this ayah)
with Our signs (object of كَذَّبُوا - they denied)
all of them (referring to آيٰتِنَا/our signs)
so we seized them (those who denied Our signs)
seizing (of عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ - One Mighty and Powerful)
of the written records/scriptures (possessed by براءة/freedom)
a united group (subject of نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ - we are a united victorious group)
the group (subject of سَيُهْزَمُ - will be defeated)
the back (what they turn in retreat)
and the Hour (as the subject of أَدْهَىٰ)
and more bitter (describing ٱلسَّاعَةُ - the Hour)
the criminals (who are in error and flames)
day (object of يُسْحَبُونَ - they are dragged)
they are being dragged (into النَّارِ/the Fire, on their faces)
their faces (being dragged on in يُسْحَبُونَ)
taste! (to a group) (command to those being dragged into the Fire)
Saqar (a name of Hell meaning 'the intensely burning fire')
indeed we (subject of خَلَقْنٰهُ - we created it)
we created it (referring to كُلَّ شَىْءٍ - everything)
with/by a measure (describes خَلَقْنٰهُ - we created it)
like a quick glance (of البصر - the eye)
with/by the sight (like a blink of an eye in كَلَمْحٍۭ)
and certainly (emphasizes the past action أَهْلَكْنَآ - we destroyed)
your followers/companions (object of أَهْلَكْنَآ - we destroyed)
then is there? (connects to أَهْلَكْنَآ - We destroyed)
any (in هَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ - 'is there any who remembers?')
one who really takes heed (after مِن)
and all, and every (as subject of فَعَلُوهُ)
they did it (referring to everything mentioned in وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ)
and every, and all (subject of مُّسْتَطَرٌ)
the God-fearing ones (who are in جَنَّاتٍ وَنَهَرٍ)
in/within (location in مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ - a true place)
in the presence of (of مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ)
a mighty king (in the presence of مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ - All-Powerful)
one who possesses complete power (in a perfect way)
